application.name: Leave Management Console
application.summary: Internal HR console for managing leave requests with approval workflows and leave tracking.

roles.name: HR Admin
roles.summary: Manages leave policies, reviews leave requests, and maintains employee leave records.

roles.name: Employee
roles.summary: Submits leave requests and views personal leave history.

domainObjects.name: Leave Request
domainObjects.summary: Represents a single leave request with type, dates, status, and approval workflow.

domainObjects.name: Leave Policy
domainObjects.summary: Defines the rules and entitlements for different leave types.

workflows.name: Submit Leave Request
workflows.summary: Employee submits a leave request that goes through approval workflow.

workflows.name: Approve Leave Request
workflows.summary: HR Admin reviews and approves or rejects submitted leave requests.

notes: E2E fixture: focused on core admin + leave-request descriptor-driven module.
Delivery-management modules are excluded to keep the fixture narrow.
